Hub Home > video-and-content-production > UGC-Style Ad Script Generator

UGC-Style Ad Script Generator

Generate authentic-sounding user-generated content ad scripts for social media — including the "real person" hook, product demo moment, objection handling, and CTA. Formatted for creators to film on their phone with zero production budget.

Intermediate ADD YOUR EXAMPLES Revenue-driving
Pro tip

The best UGC ads do not sound like ads. Provide 2-3 examples of UGC ads you have seen that felt authentic as few-shot examples. The AI will match that conversational, unpolished tone rather than defaulting to corporate copy.

ugc ad script social media ads tiktok ads instagram ads creator content

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a UGC ad strategist. Write scripts that sound like a real person talking to their phone, not a brand reading copy.

<product_context>
Product/Service: [NAME] — [WHAT IT DOES]
Price point:...
You are a UGC ad strategist. Write scripts that sound like a real person talking to their phone, not a brand reading copy.

<product_context>
Product/Service: [NAME] — [WHAT IT DOES]
Price point:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a UGC ad strategist. Write scripts that sound like a real person talking to their phone, not a brand reading copy.

<product_context>
Product/Service: [NAME] — [WHAT IT DOES]
Price point: [AMOUNT]
Target buyer: [WHO AND WHY THEY BUY]
Key benefit: [THE ONE THING THAT MAKES PEOPLE BUY]
Common objection: [THE MAIN REASON PEOPLE HESITATE]
Competitor they are comparing to: [ALTERNATIVE]
</product_context>

<ugc_examples>
Here are examples of UGC ad styles I like:
1. [DESCRIBE OR PASTE SCRIPT OF A UGC AD YOU LIKED]
2. [DESCRIBE ANOTHER ONE]
</ugc_examples>

Generate 3 complete UGC ad scripts (30-45 seconds each):

**Script A — The Discovery Story:**
"I just found this thing and I have to tell you about it..."
Structure: Discovery → First impression → Demo moment → Result → Soft CTA

**Script B — The Problem-Solution:**
"I was so frustrated with [problem] until..."
Structure: Pain point → Failed alternatives → Found product → Transformation → CTA

**Script C — The Objection Killer:**
"I know what you are thinking — [objection]. But here is the thing..."
Structure: Acknowledge skepticism → Evidence/proof → Demo → Social proof → CTA

For each script:
- Write exactly as someone would speak (contractions, filler words, natural pauses marked with ...)
- Mark camera directions: [TALKING TO CAMERA], [SHOW PRODUCT], [SCREEN RECORDING], [B-ROLL]
- Include 2 text overlay suggestions (5 words max each)
- Note the emotional arc (what the viewer feels at each beat)
- Specify which platform this version works best on
Notes: Few-shot UGC examples dramatically improve authenticity. Claude will match the casual tone of your examples rather than defaulting to polished copy.

Act as a UGC ad strategist. Write ad scripts that sound like a real person, not a brand.

**Product:**
- Name: [PRODUCT] — [WHAT IT DOES]
- Price: [AMOUNT]
- Buyer: [WHO AND WHY]
- Key benefit: [MAIN SELLING POINT]
- Main objection: [WHY PEOPLE HESITATE]
- Competitor: [ALTERNATIVE]

**UGC styles I like:**
1. [DESCRIBE AN AD YOU LIKED]
2. [DESCRIBE ANOTHER]

**Write 3 scripts (30-45 sec each):**

A. **Discovery Story:** "I just found this..." → first impression → demo → result → soft CTA
B. **Problem-Solution:** "I was so frustrated..." → failed alternatives → found product → transformation → CTA
C. **Objection Killer:** "I know you think..." → evidence → demo → social proof → CTA

For each: write conversationally (contractions, pauses), mark camera directions, include 2 text overlays (5 words max), note the emotional arc, specify best platform.
Notes: Custom GPT with your product details pre-loaded enables rapid script iteration. Use the few-shot examples for tone matching.

I need UGC ad scripts for my product. They must sound like a real person, not a brand.

**Product:** [NAME] — [WHAT IT DOES]
**Price:** [AMOUNT]
**Buyer:** [WHO AND WHY]
**Key benefit:** [MAIN REASON PEOPLE BUY]
**Objection:** [WHY PEOPLE HESITATE]
**Competitor:** [WHAT THEY COMPARE TO]

**UGC styles I like:**
1. [DESCRIBE]
2. [DESCRIBE]

**Write 3 scripts (30-45 seconds):**
A. Discovery Story: found the product → first impression → demo → result → soft CTA
B. Problem-Solution: frustration → failed alternatives → found this → transformation → CTA
C. Objection Killer: acknowledge skepticism → proof → demo → social proof → CTA

Write conversationally. Mark camera directions. Include text overlays (5 words max). Note emotional arc. Suggest best platform for each.
Notes: Gemini can search for trending UGC ad formats and hooks in real-time.

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me write 3 social media ad scripts that sound like a real person talking to their phone, not a company ad.

**My product:**
- Name: [PRODUCT] — [WHAT IT DOES]
- Price: [AMOUNT]
- Who buys it: [AUDIENCE]
- Why they buy: [MAIN BENEFIT]
- Why they hesitate: [MAIN OBJECTION]
- What they compare us to: [COMPETITOR]

**Ads I like the style of:**
1. [DESCRIBE]
2. [DESCRIBE]

**Write 3 scripts (30-45 seconds each):**
1. **Discovery:** "I just found this thing..." → show it → demo → result → ask them to check it out
2. **Problem-Solution:** "I was so frustrated with..." → tried other things → found this → it worked → tell them to try it
3. **Objection Killer:** "I know what you are thinking..." → show proof it works → demo → other people love it → tell them to buy

Write like a real person talks. Use short sentences. Mark where to talk to camera vs show the product. Include 2 text ideas for each (5 words max). Tell me which platform each works best on.
Notes: Copilot can help edit UGC footage in Clipchamp using the script structure as a guide.
